name: Logistics Innovation Technologies Corp. Units
summary: Logistics Innovation Technologies Corp. Units each consist of one share of Class A common stock and one-half of one redeemable warrant. Logistics Innovation Technologies Corp. is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company may pursue an initial business combination target in any industry or geographic region.
